organization.name: Lombardia Integrata . Servizi Infotelematici per il Territorio
organization.legalName: Lombardia Integrata S.p.A. Servizi Infotelematici per il Territorio

evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Lombardia Integrata . Servizi Infotelematici per il Territorio is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Italy. It provides digital trust services via agid.gov.it.
